item.title: The Au Pair Case: Disturbing Footage and Emergency Calls
item.description: A factual look at the Au Pair case, reviewing emergency calls and relevant footage while presenting the investigation with sensitivity and accuracy.

media:content.media:description: A factual look at the Au Pair case, reviewing emergency calls and relevant footage while presenting the investigation with sensitivity and accuracy.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Footage Inside the Terrible Turpin House
item.description: A factual look at footage from the Turpin house, showing the conditions and context of the investigation while respecting the sensitivity of the case.

media:content.media:description: A factual look at footage from the Turpin house, showing the conditions and context of the investigation while respecting the sensitivity of the case.

item.title: The Unsettling Story Behind Janet Abaroa's Case
item.description: A factual look at Janet Abaroa’s case, examining the events, investigation, and lingering questions surrounding her story.

media:content.media:description: A factual look at Janet Abaroa’s case, examining the events, investigation, and lingering questions surrounding her story.

item.title: She Got Rid of Her Best Friend to Steal Her Baby
item.description: A look at a situation where a woman manipulated her best friend to take custody of her baby, exploring the events and consequences responsibly.

media:content.media:title: She Got Rid of Her Best Friend to Steal Her Baby
media:content.media:description: A look at a situation where a woman manipulated her best friend to take custody of her baby, exploring the events and consequences responsibly.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: The Brutal Case of Katie Autry on Campus
item.description: A factual overview of the Katie Autry case, examining the events on campus and the investigation that followed, presented with sensitivity and clarity.

media:content.media:description: A factual overview of the Katie Autry case, examining the events on campus and the investigation that followed, presented with sensitivity and clarity.

item.title: An Affair, A Bloodbath Dismemberment, & The Ultimate Betrayal | The WILD Story of Melanie McGuire
item.description: A factual look at the Melanie McGuire case, covering the complex events, investigation, and legal proceedings in this high-profile criminal story.

media:content.media:title: An Affair, A Bloodbath Dismemberment, & The Ultimate Betrayal | The WILD Story of Melanie McGuire
media:content.media:description: A factual look at the Melanie McGuire case, covering the complex events, investigation, and legal proceedings in this high-profile criminal story.
